title: Tether, Nvidia and Amazon Back Humanoid Robotics Firm NEURA in $1.4 Billion Funding Round
snippet: Stablecoin giant Tether led a massive Series C round for German robotics firm NEURA, which will embed crypto payment tools and edge AI.

title: Anchorage backs Treasury’s GENIUS AML rules, seeks secondary-market sanctions clarity
snippet: A public comment letter argues that regulated stablecoin issuers need clearer compliance standards to avoid sanctions risks tied to secondary-market activity.

title: DBS to launch tokenized physical gold for Singapore retail investors
snippet: DBS bank has announced plans to offer tokenized physical gold to customers, with DBS Physical Gold Tokens available to retail clients via the DBS digibank app in the second half of 2026. The bank says it is the first such offering in Singapore to let customers digitally access, hold and trade tokeni

title: Community bank group launches new ad campaign targeting Clarity Act stablecoin reward language
snippet: A key group representing small to mid-sized community banks plans to launch a new ad warning of risks in digital assets.

title: Archax enables real-time interest payments on Hedera
snippet: Archax, the UK/EU-regulated digital asset platform, today announced real-time streaming cash flows for tokenized securities on Hedera, the trusted public network for building fast, secure, and compliant decentralized applications.

title: Tether leads up to $1.4 billion round in robotics firm Neura, plans crypto wallet integration
snippet: Tether will also provide and "deploy" technology within the Neura robotics ecosystem, including a crypto wallet integration.

title: Clearstream unveils digital-first securities infrastructure
snippet: Clearstream, Deutsche Börse Group’s post-trade business, unveils a next-generation digital securities infrastructure for both traditional and tokenized securities markets.

title: Visa says stablecoins are ‘reshaping the back end’ of commerce as it expands AI, tokenization efforts
snippet: Visa said stablecoins are reshaping commerce as it unveiled new AI tools, tokenization features, and a partnership with OpenAI.

title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails

title: UK crypto advocates launch campaign against banks blocking exchange transfers
snippet: Stand With Crypto UK says banks are restricting access to regulated exchanges even as policymakers seek to position the country as a hub for digital asset innovation.

title: Oil tankers increase ‘dark’ transits through Strait of Hormuz
snippet: Donald Trump says US launched ‘secret mission’ to help move crude through the waterway

title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
snippet: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

title: Banks Say Stablecoin Rules Should Cover Secondary Markets
snippet: Banking industry trade groups argue AML rules should focus on higher-risk activity while addressing gaps in stablecoin secondary markets.

title: Yellow Card selects Turnkey for stablecoin payments in emerging markets
snippet: Yellow Card, one of the largest licensed stablecoin infrastructure providers in the world, operating across 34 countries, including 20 in Africa, has selected Turnkey for stablecoin payments in emerging markets.

snippet: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan says it was “pretty hard to engage with advisers on Bitcoin” during recent discussions, who are more interested in stablecoins and tokenization.
